stemHtml:
According to EASA AIR OPS SPA.LVO.100, which of the following items regarding Low visibility operations are correct?
The operator shall only conduct the following low visibility operations (LVO) when approved by the competent authority:

1. Low visibility take-off (LVTO) operation
2. Lower than standard category I (LTS CAT I) operation
3. Standard category I (CAT I)
4. Standard category II (CAT II)
5. Standard category III (CAT III)
6. Approach operation utilising enhanced vision systems (EVS)
7. Any procedures that require autoland
